rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by both models. The description 'Bt over' from gemini-flash is an exact match for the image, superior to gpt-5-mini's 'Brought over'. This entry is positioned distinctly on the right side of the page.

gemini-flash provided the accurate description 'Tradesmen. bills by' and correctly identified it as a header. gpt-5-mini had a significantly different and less accurate description ('Praderson, bill, viz'). Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's reading.

The description 'Dudley Plumber' was agreed by both models. Monetary amounts '10 8 3' are clearly visible in the image and were correctly extracted by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly reported no monetary amounts for this row.
rows.english_description: Payment to Dudley, the plumber, for plumbing work or services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Dudley, the plumber, for plumbing work or services, amounting to £10 8s 3d.

rows.notes: The description 'Barton Printer' was agreed by both models. Visual inspection of the image clearly shows the shillings value as '8', which was correctly extracted by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misread this as '7'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Barton, the printer, for printing services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Barton, the printer, for printing services, amounting to £10 8s 3d.

rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identified this as a header row with no associated monetary amounts and accurately transcribed the description 'Domen Wine bill &'. gpt-5-mini misidentified it as an entry with an incorrect description ('Downs Wine bottles') and incorrect amounts ('25 1 0').

rows.description: les Underwood drawing of new chimney

The note about 'les' being faded and shillings '1' being thin is accurate. gpt-5-mini significantly misread the description ('Mr Underwood drawing & pa chimneys') and amounts ('4 4 1').
rows.english_description: Payment to Les Underwood for drawing plans for a new chimney.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Les Underwood for drawing plans for a new chimney, amounting to £25 1s 0d.

rows.notes: This row was missed entirely by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash correctly identified the description as a ditto mark '—' and the amounts as '1 12'. The pence value of '12' clearly exceeds the typical 0-11 range but is unambiguously written in the ledger, as noted by gemini-flash. This is preserved as a transcription of a likely clerk's error or specific notation.
rows.english_description: Unclear — possible transcription error or an unspecified small charge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Unclear — possible transcription error or an unspecified small charge, amounting to £0 1s 12d.

rows.notes: Monetary values '1697 0 0' were agreed by both models for this final boxed total. gpt-5-mini correctly left the description field empty, as the numbers themselves represent the total and there's no descriptive text in that column for this row. gemini-flash incorrectly included the numeric total as the description.
